description: The Ag105 always returns the status byte prior to any requested field value upon a read request.

bits.name: Power Tracking
bits.meaning: Charge profile is tracking the input power

bits.name: Constant Voltage
bits.meaning: Ag105 is in constant voltage mode

bits.name: Constant Current
bits.meaning: Ag105 is in constant current mode

bits.name: Thermal Limiting
bits.meaning: Charge profile is limited due to battery temperature

notes: The Thermal Shutdown row's middle bit renders as a stylized 'v' in the datasheet (OCR/print artifact); the correct value is binary 1 1 0.
